creator: ozawa@ongs.co.jp
text:
- It fail to build in custom LOCALBASE/PREFIX.
  (details: http://qatty.tecnik93.com/logs/7-STABLE-FPT-CustDir/neko-1.8.0.log)

How-To-Repeat: # make LOCALBASE=/usr/PPP X11BASE=/usr/PPP PREFIX=/usr/PPP
# ls work/neko-1.8.0/bin/regexp.ndll
ls: work/neko-1.8.0/bin/regexp.ndll: No such file or directory
